summary: Keep the short North Star mission anchor and add an adjacent AIOS Capability Layer explaining measurement-grade evidence discipline, source-of-truth control, policy, governance, and Prime Gate / Gate PM review.
owner_intended_meaning: AIOS should let the owner operate more like a CEO through controlled delegation. Routine validation, evidence checks, and escalation boundaries can move through the system while strategic control stays with the owner.
canonical_source: Owner semantic decision in current session plus North Star RCA owner report.
claim_boundary: North Star remains short. Adjacent capability layer may describe measurement/evidence/policy/governance/Prime Gate support and controlled delegation. Forbidden positive claims listed in the owner task remain blocked.
